title: Agile Office — Madhapur
overview: Hybrid workplace design with focus pods, town-hall, and breakout lounges for a growing tech team.
brief: A scaling product team required a workplace that supports both deep focus and spontaneous collaboration — without expanding beyond an existing floor plate in Madhapur.
approach: Activity-based planning sized focus pods to actual usage data, not headcount. Prefabricated joinery and parallel procurement compressed the programme while brand-aligned finishes anchored reception and town-hall moments.

execution.details: Fast-track programme with pre-fabricated joinery and parallel procurement lanes.

outcome.summary: Floor opened on the committed date with town-hall AV commissioned before staff move-in — zero day-one snag list items in client-facing zones.
